creator: Z-Anatomy (Gauthier Kervyn de Meerendré)
basedOn: BodyParts3D, © The Database Center for Life Science (DBCLS), Japan
shareAlikeNotice: This derived model and any further derivatives must be distributed under CC BY-SA 4.0 with attribution to Z-Anatomy and BodyParts3D.
changes: Extracted the 789 named muscle meshes from the 'Muscular system' collection

Keyword-mapped each muscle to one of 14 major groups (Chest, Shoulders, Biceps, Triceps, Forearms, Lats, Upper Back, Lower Back, Traps, Core, Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes, Calves); excluded head/face/hand/foot/internal muscles
Joined muscles per group, normalized scale and centered for web use
Decimated for web delivery (~140k triangles total)
Applied a soft per-group tint as the material color and tagged each group object with a `muscle_group` glTF extra for in-app tap/highlight
